message:
fix(config,process): overflow-safe backoff delay and bounded process wait

Two bugs found during fresh-eyes code review:

1. config_types.c: Linear backoff delay calculation could overflow
   uint64_t when initial_delay_ns * (attempt+1) exceeds UINT64_MAX.
   Fix: check if factor exceeds max_delay/initial before multiplying.

2. process.c: asx_process_wait_with_output polled in an unbounded
   loop. If auto_exit==0 and no kill signal, this loops forever.
   Fix: add 10,000 poll iteration guard, return ASX_E_POLL_BUDGET_
   EXHAUSTED if exceeded.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
